body:
Hannah, thanks so much for the thoughtful note — really appreciated you flagging those concerns about the go-to-market sequencing before we head into the new year. I've been chewing on your feedback and I think you're right that [Datastream](datastream.io) needs to nail the enterprise pilot cohort before pushing into the mid-market, even if it means a slower Q1 ramp. I shared your perspective with the rest of the [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) team this week and there was strong alignment, particularly around the idea of anchoring the first three pilots in the energy verticle where the data density story is most compelling. Would you be open to a call in the next week or two to pressure-test the revised pipeline targets before I loop back to the founders with our updated guidance? Your pattern recognition here across infrastructure plays has been invaluable, and I want to make sure we're leaning on it fully before we finalize anything.

Amara
